body_txt: The first step on The Hero's Journey . The Hero learns that they must leave the comfort and safety they are used to and take on a great challenge that lies before them. Typically requires the hero to leave their hometown and go on The Quest into unknown regions. How the hero reacts to the call to adventure varies. Sometimes they are ready to escape their Small Town Boredom and jump at the call . Other times, the hero rejects the call , but the call doesn't easily take "No" for an answer . The Call to Adventure may be carried to the hero by one or more Heralds or the hero's soon-to-be Mentor . Not to be confused with The Call , a 2013 film, nor with Regina Spektor 's song from the movie Prince Caspian .
